completionCriteria: External-only checks are documented with owner and manual steps.
Sentry error boundary capture is no-op when DSNs are absent.
Sentry event scrubbing removes raw headers, URL query/hash, breadcrumb data outside the allowlist, and prompt-like payloads.
CLI verification results and remaining provider warnings are recorded in docs.
docs/plan/execution-order.md is updated last with the actual release-readiness result.
Focused verification and git diff checks pass before commit.

tasks.task: Create machine-readable task tracker and updater
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Task states can be updated without hand-editing JSON formatting.

tasks.task: Record current release monitoring readiness from CLI checks
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Vercel, Railway health, Sentry projects, secrets check, robots, and sitemap results are documented with remaining warnings.
tasks.notes: CLI baseline and remaining warnings documented.

tasks.task: Capture product route error boundary exceptions in Sentry
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Product error boundary sends sanitized boundary metadata to Sentry and keeps user-facing UI unchanged.
tasks.notes: Product error boundary now captures via Sentry adapter.

tasks.task: Add root global-error boundary with Sentry capture
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Root rendering errors are captured without exposing raw error details in UI.
Sentry scrub removes URL query/hash, raw headers, breadcrumb data outside the allowlist, and prompt-like values.
tasks.notes: Sentry scrub allowlist hardened for request URL, headers, query, and breadcrumb data.

tasks.task: Document release-minimum monitoring state and manual follow-ups
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Docs distinguish completed release-minimum checks from deferred Loki, Crons, rollback automation, and deep health work.
tasks.notes: Manual follow-ups and release-minimum state documented.

tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Execution order reflects the completed monitoring release minimum and explicitly deferred post-release monitoring work.
tasks.notes: Execution order updated with monitoring release minimum and deferred P1+ scope.

tasks.task: Run focused verification and fix regressions
evidence: npm run test:unit -- src/lib/sanitize.test.ts src/lib/sentry-sanitize.test.ts src/lib/logger.test.ts src/lib/observability/client.test.ts src/app/(product)/error.test.tsx src/app/global-error.test.tsx
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Focused tests, static checks, dead-code check, and git diff checks pass or failures are documented with a blocking reason.
tasks.notes: Focused tests, backend sanitizer/health tests, lint, security scan, and git diff --check completed. npx tsc --noEmit is blocked by existing unrelated dirty worktree errors in src/bff/billing/es-review-stream-policy.test.ts and src/lib/stripe/config.test.ts.
